info.name: Exam Flows
info.description:
Full backend exam flow collection covering redesigned exam access and legacy compatibility routes.

Run folders in order:
1. 00 Auth & Bootstrap
2. 01 Admin - Redesign
3. 02 Public & Learner - Redesign
4. 03 Legacy Compatibility
5. 04 Negative & Edge Cases

Manual inputs still required for security-sensitive steps:
- inviteToken: paste the raw invite token from the invite email or SMTP catcher. The database stores only tokenHash, so the raw token cannot be recovered from DB after creation.
- openExternalOtpCode, manualOtpCode, inviteOtpCode: paste OTP values from the delivered email or SMTP catcher. OTPs are stored in application memory, not in the database.

Collection-level pre-request script auto-generates:
- pastStartDate / futureEndDate / rescheduledEndDate
- unique fallback external emails if corresponding environment variables are blank

The collection assumes response bodies are wrapped by the API success envelope.

exec: const ensureEnv = (key, value) => { if (!pm.environment.get(key)) { pm.environment.set(key, value); } };

request.description: Create a draft open-registration exam that can be started immediately after publish.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Open Registration Exam {{$timestamp}}",
  "slug": "open-registration-{{$timestamp}}",
  "duration": 60,
  "startDate": "{{pastStartDate}}",
  "endDate": "{{futureEndDate}}",
  "isVisible": false,
  "maxAttempts": 2,
  "accessMode": "open_registration",
  "selfRegistrationApprovalMode": "auto",
  "selfRegistrationPasswordRequired": false,
  "allowExternalCandidates": true,
  "registrationOpenAt": null,
  "registrationCloseAt": null,
  "challenges": [
    {
      "type": "existing",
      "challengeId": "{{firstChallengeId}}",
      "orderIndex": 0
    }
  ]
}
